subcodes.first_line: O My friend! The birds of the meadow have struck up such a melody that they cast their tumult throughout all regions and their clamour throughout the world [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای دوست من مرغان چمن آهنگی بنواختند که غلغله در آفاق انداختند و ولوله در جهان
subcodes.subjects: @forces of light and darkness; integration and disintegration, @critique of Eastern values; culture, @growth of the Cause, @praise of Western values; culture
